hero.title: Nidaamyada Injineerinka ee Heerka Sare
hero.subtitle: Software-ka Enterprise · AI & Barashada Mashiinka · Kaabayaasha Daruuraha · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Laga soo bilaabo otomaatiga caqliga leh ilaa madalaha daruuraha, waxaan naqshadeynaa oo keennaa tiknoolajiyada awooda ganacsiyada hamiga leh — waqtiga, miisaaniyadda, iyo baaxadda.
hero.trustLine: Waxaa lagu kalsoon yahay shirkadaha caalamka

services.subtitle: Adeegyada
services.title: Injineerinka Buuxa ee Spectrum-ka
services.description: Lix goobood oo tababar ah. Hal koox. Lakab kasta oo tiknoolajiyadaada ah — laga bilaabo qalabka geeska ilaa dashboard-yada shirkadaha.

customSoftware.title: Horumarinta Software-ka Gaarka ah
customSoftware.description: Barnaamijyada casriga ah ee lagu dhisay microservices, APIs, iyo architecture-ka dabiiciga ah ee cloud-ka.

aiMl.title: AI, ML iyo Sirdoonka Ganacsiga
aiMl.description: Pipelines AI/ML, dashboards-ka Power BI, iyo falanqaynta horumarsan ee xogta u beddesha go'aanno.

cloud.title: Qaab-dhismeedka Daruurta iyo Kaabayaasha
cloud.description: Kaabayaasha daruuraha badan leh oo leh containers, serverless, iyo scaleability caalami ah oo ku dhisan.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Qalabka isku xiran, mataanaha dijitaalka ah, iyo kombiyuutarka edge ee Industry 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Injineerinka Madasha
devops.description: Pipelines CI/CD, kaabayaasha sida koodh, iyo la arki karo laga bilaabo commit ilaa wax-soo-saarka.

digital.title: Isbeddelka Dijitaalka & La-talin
digital.description: Istaraatiijiyadda tiknoolajiyadda, khariidadaha casriyeynta, iyo la-talin gacanta ah.

cta.title: Aan Dhisno Wax Dhab Ah
cta.description: Laga bilaabo horumarinta software-ka gaarka ah iyo xalalka AI-ga ku shaqeeya ilaa kaabayaasha daruurta iyo otomaatiga — waxaan bixinaa adeegyo tiknoolajiyadeed oo dhamaad ilaa dhammaad ah oo loo habeeyay baahiyahaaga.

credibility.subtitle: Rikoodhkeena
credibility.title: Natiijooyin, ma <gradient>aha ballanqaadyo</gradient>
credibility.description: Laga bilaabo Sarajevo ilaa Oslo, Amsterdam, iyo Berlin. Nidaamyada Enterprise ayaa waqtigooda la keenay, mar walba.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM ee Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Wuxuu naqshadeeyay kaabayaasha One Identity ee ugu horreeyay ee daruurta ku saleysan ee Atlas Copco ee Azure Kubernetes, isagoo yareynaya kharashaadka isla markaana ilaalinaya u hoggaansanaanta shirkadda.

orange.label: Madal Difaaca Cyber-ka ee Orange
orange.outcome: Wuxuu horumariyay kaabayaasha Azure Kubernetes, dhuumaha CI/CD, iyo isku-darka ServiceNow ee shirkadda hormuudka ah ee amniga internetka ee Yurub.

telecom.label: Madal Telecom GIS & AR
telecom.outcome: Waxay dhiseen madal GIS oo khariideynaya adeegyo dhulka hoostiisa ah oo ku yaal Jarmalka iyadoo ogaanshaha shilalka uu ka hortagayo waxyeello kaabayaasha malaayiin Euro ah.

iot.label: Madal Cloud IoT & Edge
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub oo maamusha kumanaan qalab, Synapse oo farsamaya balaayiin safaf telemetry ah, iyadoo edge aggregation ay dhimayso kharashka fariimaha ~90%.

drone.label: Madal Drone-ka Madax-bannaan
drone.outcome: Xakameeyaha duulimaadka gaarka ah oo leh buundada IoT Hub ee 4G ilaa Azure taasoo suurtagelinaysa duulimaadyada BVLOS ee madax-bannaan ee kormeerka beeraha iyo gaarsiinta xamuulka.

payment.label: Badbaadinta Nidaamka Bixinta
payment.outcome: Waxaa la badbaadiyay albaabka lacag-bixinta ee fashilmay ee barnaamijka moobilka Norway iyadoo la adeegsanayo reverse-engineering koodhka aan la diiwaangelin ee hore. Eber lacag joojin kadib casriyeynta.

game.label: Qalabka AAA ee horumarinta ciyaarta
game.outcome: Waxaan dhisay plugin Maya ah oo yareeyay waqtiga moodelka 3D iyo animation-ka 50% studio weyn oo AAA ah, taasoo loo adeegsaday qalab caadi ah oo ku jira warshadaha wax-soo-saarka.

social.label: Madal Bulsho oo ku saleysan Goobta
social.outcome: Barnaamij shukaansi oo la naqshadeeyay oo loogu talagalay nolosha habeenkii Spain oo leh isbarbardhigga geolocation, farriimo waqtiga-dhabta ah, iyo ogeysiisyo push ah oo loogu talagalay macmiil UK ah.

iga.label: Madasha IGA ee Kiraystayaasha Badan
iga.outcome: Waxaa la dhisay backend-ka aasaasiga ah ee madal maamul aqoonsi oo daruu-native ah oo u adeegaya macaamiisha Fortune 500 iyadoo la adeegsanayo ASP.NET Core Identity gaar ah oo loogu talagalay NoSQL heerka shirkadaha.

euAdjacent.title: Gaarsiinta Caalamiga ah ee EU-ga ku dhow
euAdjacent.description: Saacadaha shaqada ee CET oo leh khibrad ku fidsan Norway, Netherlands, Germany, iyo meelo kale.

yourEngineers.title: Injineeradaada, ma ahan iibiye
yourEngineers.description: Xubno kooxeed oo go'an oo ku dhex jira hawshaada shaqada iyo qalabkaaga. Ma jiraan maamulayaasha akoonka, ma jiraan safafka tigidhada.

hardwareToCloud.title: Qalabka ilaa Cloud
hardwareToCloud.description: Laga soo bilaabo firmware-ka qalabka la dhex geliyey ilaa pipelines Azure Synapse ee shirkadaha. Software buuxa oo ku yaal lakab kasta.

partners.subtitle: Xirmada Tiknoolajiyada
partners.title: <gradient>Stack</gradient> la tijaabiyay dagaalka
partners.description: Ma isticmaalno kaliya qalabkan — waxaan la dirnay nidaamyada wax-soo-saarka. Laga bilaabo Microsoft Azure ilaa Kubernetes, injineeradeenu waxay haystaan khibrad dhab ah.

cloudInfra.label: Daruur iyo Kaabayaasha
cloudInfra.description: Qaab-dhismeedka daruuraha badan oo leh habeynta container iyo kaabayaasha sida koodh.

frontend.label: Qaybta hore
frontend.description: Qaab-dhismeedyo casri ah oo leh badbaado nooca iyo qalabka dhismaha la hagaajiyay.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Madalaha server-ka heerka shirkadaha, luqadaha nidaamyada, iyo hababka API-ga casriga ah.

data.label: Xog & Kaydinta
data.description: Kaydka xiriirka, dukumentiga, iyo xusuusta oo leh raadinta qoraalka buuxa.

devops.label: DevOps & Qalabka
devops.description: Pipelines CI/CD, xakamaynta noocyada, iyo wax-soosaarka horumariyaha.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native sida Default
cloudNative.description: Mashruuc kasta waa la ilaaliyaa, CI/CD ku shaqeeya, waxaana loo dhisay cabbirka toosan laga bilaabo maalintii ugu horreysay.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Laga bilaabo frontends-ka React ilaa microservices .NET ilaa Kubernetes clusters — hal koox, dhammaad ilaa dhammaad.

productionProven.title: Soo saarid la xaqiijiyay
productionProven.description: Kuwani ma aha tignoolajiyado demo ah. Qalab kasta oo liiska ku qoran wuxuu awood u leeyahay nidaamyada dhabta ah ee u adeegaya isticmaaleyaasha dhabta ah maanta.

faq.subtitle: Saldhigga Aqoonta
faq.title: <gradient>Su'aalaha</gradient> Inta Badan La Isweydiiyo
faq.description: Wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay inaad ka ogaato la shaqeynta Horizon Tech

scope.question: Maxay tahay shaqadaada?
scope.answer: Waxaan fulinaa mashaariic tiknoolajiyadeed oo dhammaad ah: software shirkadeed oo gaar ah, khadadka AI/ML, kaabayaasha daruurta, nidaamyada IoT, otomaatiga DevOps, iyo la-talin isbeddelka dijitaalka ah. Haddii aad u baahan tahay madal dhamaystiran oo laga dhisay eber ama isku xirnaan bartilmaameed ah oo la leh stack-kaaga hore, annaga ayaa maamula qaab-dhismeedka, horumarinta, tijaabinta, iyo hirgelinta.

stack.question: Waa maxay tiknoolajiyadaada aasaasiga ah?
stack.answer: Stack-keena aasaasiga ah wuxuu diiradda saaraa madalaha heerka shirkadaha: Azure iyo AWS oo loogu talagalay daruurta, .NET iyo Node.js oo loogu talagalay backend-ka, React iyo Angular oo loogu talagalay frontend-ka, Kubernetes iyo Docker oo loogu talagalay orchestration, iyo Terraform oo loogu talagalay kaabayaasha sida koodh. Waxaan sidoo kale si ballaaran ula shaqeynaa Python ee shaqada AI/ML, Power BI iyo Fabric ee sirdoonka ganacsiga, iyo PostgreSQL, SQL Server, iyo MongoDB xogta.

enterprise.question: Sidee baad u maamushaa mashaariicda ganacsiga?
enterprise.answer: Is-dhexgalka kasta wuxuu bilaabmaa marxalad helitaan si loo qeexo baaxadda, qaab-dhismeedka, iyo heerarka muhiimka ah. Waxaad helaysaa koox go'an oo leh hogaamiye farsamo, dib-u-eegis joogto ah oo heerarka muhiimka ah, iyo marin toos ah oo la xiriira injineerada dhisaya nidaamkaaga. Waxaan raacnaa sprints agile ah oo leh demos daneeyayaasha, waxaan haynaa guddiyo mashruuc oo hufan, waxaanan bixinaa warbixinno horumar toddobaadle ah.

support.question: Sidee bay u egtahay taageerada kadib bilowga?
support.answer: Waxaan bixinaa heerar taageero oo nidaamsan oo leh SLAs la qeexay, oo ay ku jiraan kormeerka 24/7, jawaabta dhacdooyinka, hagaajinta waxqabadka, iyo soo celinta astaamaha. Heshiisyada taageeradayada waxay daboolayaan hagaajinta cawooyinka, hagaajinta amniga, baaxadda kaabayaasha, iyo hubinta caafimaadka ee firfircoon — kuwaas oo loo habeeyay baahiyahaaga waqtiga iyo jawaabtaada.

integration.question: Ma ku dhex milmi kartaa kaabayaashayada hadda jira?
integration.answer: Dabcan. Waxaan ku takhasusay casriyeynta dhaxalka ah, isku-darka API-ka koowaad, iyo isbeddelada daruuraha isku dhafan. Haddii aad u baahan tahay inaad ku xirnaato nidaamyada ERP-ga ee gudaha ah, inaad ka guurto monoliths una guurto microservices, ama aad isku xirto xog-ururinta hore iyo frontends casri ah, waxaan haynaa buugaagta isbeddelka iyo khibradda isku-darka si ay u noqoto mid aan habboonayn.

industries.question: Warshadaha noocee ah ayaad ka shaqeysay?
industries.answer: Kooxdayadu waxay fulisay mashaariic ka kala socda fintech, caafimaadka, saadka, e-commerce, tamarta, iyo dawladda. Waxaan fahamsanahay shuruudaha gaarka ah ee warshadaha sida PCI-DSS ee lacag-bixinta, tixgelinta HIPAA ee xogta caafimaadka, u hoggaansanaanta GDPR ee suuqyada EU, iyo telemetry-ga waqtiga-dhabta ah ee IoT-ga warshadaha.

engagement.question: Sidee ayuu u egyahay habka guurka?
engagement.answer: Waxay ku bilaabataa wicitaan ogaanshaha si loo fahmo yoolalkaaga iyo xaaladda farsamada. Halkaas ka dib, waxaan keennaa dukumenti ballaaran oo leh talooyin qaab-dhismeed, jadwalka, iyo faahfaahinta maalgashiga. Marka la ansixiyo, waxaan ku bilaabaynaa koox go'an ah, waxaan ku biirnaa qalabkaaga iyo habraacyadaada, waxaanan bilaabaynaa orodka ugu horreeya maalmo gudahood.

faq.ctaDescription: Mashruuc ma maskaxda ku haysaa? Aan ka hadalno baaxadda, jadwalka, iyo miisaaniyadda.
